answer: Xero offers a free Starter tier for developers that includes no monthly fee, a maximum of 5 connections, and access to developer tools, resources, and standard API features [1][2]. This tier is designed to support early innovation and is available for apps that do not require premium features [1][3]. To begin, you can sign up for a free Xero developer account to access SDKs, documentation, and the demo company for testing [4][5]. Moving beyond the Starter tier requires adding a valid credit card to your developer portal account [1][3].
